subcodes.first_line: O thou who art intoxicated with the wine of God's love! The sweet fragrance that was wafted from the rose-garden of inner meanings hath reached the senses [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرمست جام محبت الله نفحه خوشی که از گلستان معانی منتشر گشته بود بمشام
subcodes.subjects: @laws of marriage and dowry, @spiritual transformation, @humility; meekness; lowliness
